title: Vision Transformers, Step by Step
tagline: How a Transformer sees an image, one patch at a time
summary: Watch a 64×64 image get sliced into patches, projected into vectors, tagged with positions, and fed through self-attention — with a live attention heatmap that updates the moment you click a patch.
highlights: Slide the patch-size slider from 4 to 32 and watch the same image turn into 256, 64, 16, or 4 patches.
Click any patch and see live dot-product attention against every other patch, rendered as a heatmap overlay.
Toggle position embeddings on and off to see how a patch bag without positions loses all spatial sense.
Draw your own image, switch among five preset pictures, and compare the CLS token's final attention across them.
